SCORPPARCH.Overlay.Move: Drag to move the map overlay
SCORPPARCH.Overlay.Resize: Drag to resize the map overlay
SCORPPARCH.Overlay.Rotate: Rotate the map overlay between portrait and landscape
SCORPPARCH.Overlay.Remove: Remove the map overlay from this scene
SCORPPARCH.EmptyHint: No map available — configure a scene in the module settings, or view a scene with a background image.
SCORPPARCH.TileShowOnMapHint: Draw this tile on the in-game map display at its scene position, with the map's theme treatment applied.
SCORPPARCH.Config.Title: In-Game Map
SCORPPARCH.Config.MenuHint: Choose the scene and actor shown on the in-game map.
SCORPPARCH.Config.Hint: The map shows a scene's background image inside a themed frame, centred on a chosen actor's token.
SCORPPARCH.Config.ThemeHint: How the map is dressed: an aged hand-drawn parchment scroll, or a sci-fi holo-tablet.
SCORPPARCH.Config.SceneHint: The scene whose background is drawn on the parchment.
SCORPPARCH.Config.ActorHint: The map centres on this actor's token in the scene above.
SCORPPARCH.Config.ZoomHint: Higher values zoom in closer around the marker.
